Night Shift

Agent-owned release management with one console for checks, deploys, and post-launch observability.

Highlights

done / ETA 0h

Ship rollback heatmap

Map failed deploys against build graph confidence. Completed in the latest autonomous cycle.

done / ETA 0h

done / ETA 0h

Changelog

# Changelog

## 2026-03-21T12:01:09.943Z

- Objective: Ship rollback heatmap for Night Shift
- Phase: launch-ready
- Prompt: Bias for operator-grade interfaces, observability, and reliability before scale stories. Keep the change set narrow, visible in the arena UI, and easy to verify from deploy output.
- Source: fallback
